description: Reference workflow that keeps both divedra coordination and the task node on claude-code-agent, authored as a linear ordered node list.

prompts.divedraPromptTemplate: Coordinate {{workflowId}} so the claude-code managers hand off one bounded task to a claude-code worker and keep the result concise.
prompts.workerSystemPromptTemplate: Work only on the current node responsibility and return a concise business JSON payload.
